title: Eyes in the Dark
description: Resource Pack that makes all mob eyes glow in the dark
body:
Spooky Vibes! Makes you feel that much more watched in minecraft!

Makes all visible eyes glow in the dark*. Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to work. Also has built in support for Fresh Animations using [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts). Any issues contact me @snowman_4 on discord. 

*Doesn't include players, or mobs with closed eyes like ghasts and sniffers.
